parameters.query: SELECT p.categoria, p.monto_limite, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(g.monto) FROM gastos g WHERE g.phone_number = p.phone_number AND g.categoria = p.categoria AND DATE_TRUNC('month', g.fecha) = DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())), 0) AS gastado FROM presupuestos p WHERE p.phone_number = '{{ $json.phone_number }}' ORDER BY p.categoria
